\tzpentry{ID3646}{Grav Quantum Charge Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3646 introduces Grav Quantum Charge Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{Q}_{\text{grav}}^{(\alpha)} = \frac{\hbar c^3}{8\pi G} \int_{-\infty}^t \left[\frac{\partial I^{(\alpha)}}{\partial\tau} - \frac{\partial S^{(\alpha)}}{\partial\tau}\right] e^{-(t-\tau)/\tau_{\text{dec}}^{(\alpha)}} d\tau \end{equation}
